# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Service configuration that exposes our application to the internet using a LoadBalancer. The app serves HTTP traffic on port 80 and HTTPS on port 443. Make it accessible from any source for maximum flexibility. This is for our public-facing API.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 8080 # replace with your app's exposed http port
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
    - port: 443
      targetPort: 8443 # replace with your app's exposed https port
      protocol: TCP
      name: https
  selector:
    app: my-app # replace with the appropriate label for your application pods
